entry_policy.normal_days: No entry fees or cover charges on regular days (Sunday to Thursday).
entry_policy.weekends: Cover charges may apply ONLY on Friday and Saturday IF a big live band or famous singer is performing that weekend. Otherwise, no cover charges even on weekends.
entry_policy.summary: We generally do not charge entry fees. Cover charges are only for special Friday/Saturday events with big performers.

dress_code.policy: No strict dress code. Decent dressing is required.
dress_code.examples: Smart casual to casual wear is fine. Please dress decently.

age_policy.first_floor: Strictly 21+ only. This is the pub and live band area. No exceptions for underage guests, even with parents.
age_policy.second_floor: Below 21 years allowed ONLY with parents/guardians. No liquor will be served to them. They will be given a RED WRISTBAND for identification.
age_policy.third_floor: Below 21 years allowed ONLY with parents/guardians. No liquor will be served to them. They will be given a RED WRISTBAND for identification.
age_policy.id_requirement: Valid government-issued photo ID required for age verification at entry.
age_policy.underage_liquor_policy: Absolutely NO liquor served to guests under 21 on any floor. Red wristband system enforced on 2nd and 3rd floors.

bar_policy.type: Full bar with all spirits, cocktails, mocktails, wines, beers, and non-alcoholic beverages.
bar_policy.underage: No liquor served to guests under 21 years of age.

payment.gst: GST applicable as per government norms

outside_food: Outside food and beverages are not allowed.
smoking: Smoking is allowed only in designated outdoor areas.
